nodes.text:
Symptoms include weight loss, altered bowel habit, reduced appetite, and intermittent bloating for 8 weeks. Patient also reports tenesmus.

MRI pelvis on 30/07/2024: T3a, N1c , CRM clear, EMVI positive.
